name: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual data entry causes compliance delays. We automate data extraction and formatting instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in compiling and formatting employee benefits enrollment data for compliance reporting.
features: Data extraction from existing HR systems

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in compiling and formatting employee benefits enrollment data for compliance reporting.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual data entry causes compliance delays. We automate data extraction and formatting instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual data entry and spreadsheet management
must_have_features: Data extraction from existing HR systems

one_liner: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual data entry causes compliance delays. We automate data extraction and formatting instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
